meaning: 卢布尔雅那[南斯拉夫西北部城市]
examples: Next trek is to the capital of Slovenia….Ljubljana!
We quickly found ourselves in the capital, Ljubljana, where a friend showed us around.
Born in Duhok in Iraqi Kurdistan in 1954, Mr Siti studied fine arts in Ljubljana from 1977 until 1982.
Around 120km southwest of Ljubljana, this pretty town reclines in a fold of forest-shrouded hills.
Next in line is Ljubljana, Slovenia, where the state takes a 39% chunk out of people's wages.
